description_long: This chaise features a modern, minimalist design with a gently contoured, asymmetrical seat surface made of a translucent or frosted material, likely glass or acrylic. The seat is supported by a striking black metal frame with four angled legs that intersect in an X-shaped configuration beneath the seat, providing both stability and a visually dynamic structure. The legs are slender and slightly splayed, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The seat surface is smooth and unadorned, with no visible upholstery, cushions, or decorative elements. There are no armrests or backrest, emphasizing the open and functional form. The overall look is sleek and suitable for urban outdoor or indoor environments such as parks, plazas, or modern public spaces.
description: A sleek, modern chaise with a translucent seat and black metal X-frame legs, featuring a minimalist, open design with no backrest or armrests.
description_view_0: From this angle, the X-shaped black metal frame is prominent beneath the translucent seat, and the splayed legs are clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the low profile and wide stance of the chaise, showing the full length of the seat and the angular spread of the legs.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this angle shows the intersecting frame and the gentle curve of the seat, with the legs appearing slightly offset.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the depth of the seat and the open space beneath, with the legs and frame forming a stable base.
attribute_backrest_design: There is no backrest present on this chaise; the seat surface is open and flat with no raised or segmented support at the rear.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slender, straight, and angled outward, constructed from black metal with a matte or powder-coated finish, forming an intersecting X-shape beneath the seat.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery or fabric; the seat surface is a solid, smooth, translucent material with no pattern or texture.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions are present; the seat is a single, continuous surface with no attached or loose cushions.
